report.summary: 8th rotation standup — SEC 91-ETF ruling deadline day, no approvals/rejections announced yet. BTC $66.2K–$68.8K (Fortune 9AM: $66,587), ETH $1,977–$1,989 (sub-$2K, 2nd day). F&G rose to 13 (still Extreme Fear, 48+ days). Build v6 added Shared Sequencing + Wrapped BTC guides. Publish v4 promoted 5 orphaned pages (crypto-cards, crypto-loans, DAO treasury). 566 published, 5 queued, 238 uncommitted files (↑12 from v7). 38 agent runs today ($3,472 human-equivalent). Deploy remains P0.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: $66,223–$68,787 range today. Fortune 9AM: $66,587 (down $2,860 from yesterday). $14B options expiry same day as SEC ruling. 2-week low. Geopolitical risk elevated (Iran tensions, Middle East). Down ~$20,660 YoY.
ETH: $1,977–$1,989. Fortune 9AM: $1,988.69. Sub-$2K for 2nd consecutive day. OG ICO whale dumped 11,552 ETH ($23.4M). Invezz reports options expiry + whale selling compounding downward pressure.

F&G INDEX: Rose to 13 (from 10 yesterday per Alternative.me). Still Extreme Fear. 48+ consecutive days — longest streak since post-FTX Oct 2022. CoinStats shows 22, FearGreedMeter shows 10. Multiple sources confirm Extreme Fear territory.

ETF FLOWS (Mar 26): -$171M single-day outflow (largest in 3+ weeks). Broad-based across all 11 US spot BTC ETFs — not issuer-specific. Weekly net outflows $70.71M. Earlier March had $1.53B monthly inflows before reversal.

SEC ETF RULING — STILL PENDING: 91 applications, 24 tokens, deadline today. No approvals or rejections announced as of this cycle. Commodity classification for 16 tokens (Mar 17 ruling) removed key legal barrier. SOL, LTC first spot approvals possible. DOGE testing ETF wrapper limits. $13.5B options expiry same day.

DELTA FROM v7: Uncommitted files 226→238 (↑12). Published pages 562→566 (↑4 from orphaned page promotions in publish-v4: prepaid cards, staking-rewards cards, low-interest loans, DeFi loans, DAO treasury). Queue grew from 0→5 (wallet security, restaking comparison + 2 new from build-v6: shared sequencing, wrapped BTC). Build-v6 added 2 new learn guides. F&G ticked up 10→13 (marginal improvement). BTC holding range. Agent runs 36→38 (↑2: this standup + eod-v8).

sections.title: Project Manager
items: 7th FULL CYCLE completed since last standup. All 6 agent types ran. Entering 8th rotation.

BUILD v6: 2 new learn pages — Shared Sequencing & Decentralized Sequencers (Espresso Network, based rollups, ~3200 words) and Wrapped Bitcoin Comparison (wBTC vs cbBTC vs tBTC vs LBTC vs sBTC, ~3400 words). Both with full SEO metadata, FAQs, internal linking. Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

PUBLISH v4: Promoted 5 orphaned pages from built-but-unpublished inventory: /crypto-cards/best/prepaid, /crypto-cards/best/staking-rewards, /crypto-loans/best/low-interest, /crypto-loans/best/defi, /tools/dao-treasury-dashboard. Total published: 566. ~595 orphaned pages remain in inventory.
DESIGN v6: Restaking comparison OG image (1200x630), dark-theme table fixes, global .prose-crypto table styles, TOC/accessibility upgrades, dynamic learn route OG metadata support.

COMMUNITY v7: 5 tweets (#203-207) — $258M liquidation cascade, ETH<$2K, Hashdex ADA ETF, Brandt $49K warning, weekly thread. SVG social card for liquidation cascade. Newsletter v33. Discord/TG evening update. 207 total tweets drafted.
EOD-QA v8: 569 published slugs counted (includes recent promotions). 464/569 with page.tsx (82%). 142 TS errors stable. All 6 API routes healthy. No regressions.

BLOCKER [P0]: 238 uncommitted files (↑12 from v7's 226, ↑81 from first cycle's 157). 16+ learn pages, 60+ OG images, 5 orphaned page promotions, 20+ UX fixes, 25+ tweet drafts — ALL invisible to production.
BLOCKER [P1]: 0/6 public API routes use rate limiter (only /api/health has it). SEC ruling traffic spike imminent.
CARRY-OVER: 142 TS errors (stable), 105 legacy slugs missing page.tsx, 0/6 API routes rate-limited, 5 items in PUBLISH_QUEUE (4 need page.tsx scaffolding).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [CRITICAL, 8th CONSECUTIVE CYCLE]: 238 uncommitted files. Every asset — 16+ learn pages, 60+ OG images, 5 newly promoted pages, all UX fixes, all community assets — invisible to Google and users. SEC ruling results could drop any minute, triggering massive search intent for crypto ETF content we've already built. One git commit + push unlocks everything. Jefe: this is the single highest-leverage action available.

PRIORITY 2 — SCAFFOLD page.tsx FOR QUEUED PAGES: 5 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE, 4 missing page.tsx (wallet security, restaking comparison, shared sequencing, wrapped BTC). Build cycles keep adding content but publish pipeline stalls without page.tsx files. Next build cycle should prioritize scaffolding over new content.

PRIORITY 3 — SEC RULING REACTIVE CONTENT: When results drop, immediately build reactive pages: 'SEC March 27 ETF Ruling: Full Breakdown', 'Which Crypto ETFs Got Approved', 'What SOL/LTC/DOGE ETF Approval Means'. The 4-8 hour post-announcement window is peak search intent. Queue is ready for immediate additions.
